title: AI Assistant Chat Transcript
scenario: Create a chat transcript for an AI assistant that has been helping a 35-year-old male plan a road trip. The transcript should be 3-5 sentences long, include a greeting and closing message, and use a friendly tone.
constraints: Must include a greeting and closing message

evaluationCriteria.description: Check that the transcript is within the 3-5 sentence limit and includes a greeting and closing message.
Check that the transcript has a friendly tone suitable for an AI assistant.
Check that the transcript is consistent with the voice and tone of an AI assistant helping a 35-year-old male plan a road trip.
